cases.name: source-recovery-rebuild-uses-existing-replacement-source
cases.description: A persisted source-recovery gate reuses its reserved replacement source when rebuild sends the source-replacement snapshot request.

sql: UPDATE _sync_attachment_state SET current_source_id = 'current-source', binding_state = 'attached', attached_user_id = 'user-1', schema_name = 'main', rebuild_required = 1 WHERE singleton_key = 1

cases.name: source-recovery-divergent-remote-replacement-fails-closed
